title: Handle "Entrypoint":[] in compat containers/create API.
body:
When using `docker compose run --entrypoint ''`, docker sends `"Entrypoint": []` in the JSON. Podman currently treats that as `nil` and fallbacks to default image entrypoint.

This is not what is expected by the user. Instead, it should not use any entrypoint.

This commit fixes it by properly propagating the `[]` downstream to libpod.

Fixes: #26078


#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?


```release-note
None
```
